pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: Maximiliane Jousse's Personal Website
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  css:
    - styles.css
  toc: false
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  editor: visual
  theme: cosmo
  title: Maximiliane Jousse
  image: media/Headshot.jpg
  about:
    template: jolla
    image-shape: round
    image-width: 250px
    links:

        href: 'https://github.com/MJousse'
